premise: A before/after transition montage contrasts two pre-transition portraits against six rooftop post-transition fashion cards, all with editable white label boxes.

cast.role: single transformation subject across before and after cards
cast.description: One featured person anchors the before/after meme arc, even though the visual presentation changes from earlier portraits to later rooftop fashion imagery.

continuity_rules: The overall story is a before/after transformation arc for one lead subject; before cards and after cards should feel related even if the source uses different photos.
The top white banner design is part of the creative content and should be rebuilt as editable Shotstack text with a white box background, not baked into media.
The small “wait for it!” box appears only in the two before cards and should remain editable too.
Platform watermark and username UI are ignored by default.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: Other partial figures in the source are incidental crop remnants, not featured supporting cast.

scene_arc.beat: Open on the first pre-transition portrait with the large before banner.
Hold on a second pre-transition portrait with the same labels.
Flip into the first golden-hour after-transition rooftop card.
Continue the rooftop reveal with a second pose.
Show a third rooftop pose with hair-touch styling.
Tighten to a closer rooftop portrait.
Hold a lower, more relaxed rooftop pose.
Finish on the longest after-transition rooftop card.
